works.lesson: Geometric display + clean grotesque = safe premium pairing
High-contrast Garamond for editorial authority. DM Sans geometric body. Distinguished from griflan's PP Editorial by classical Garamond DNA.
works.caution: DM Sans is an emerging AI fingerprint font (RULE-015). Consider alternatives for future projects.

works.lesson: Condensed all-caps for brutalist impact + geometric sans for tech-forward body. JetBrains Mono for creative developer credibility. 16.4x ratio.
Bebas Neue gives condensed bold impact for cyberpunk headings. Space Grotesk geometric sans reads well on dark canvas. JetBrains Mono perfect for terminal/specs aesthetic.
works.repetitionWarning: Identical pairing to Coque (2 days prior). Intentional for cyberpunk context but pushes sameness boundary.

works.lesson: High-contrast transitional serif + geometric humanist sans + architectural mono. Chosen to differentiate from Forge (Cormorant+DM Sans) and Coque (Bebas+Space Grotesk). Serif communicates permanence for real estate.
works.caution: Plus Jakarta Sans is an emerging AI fingerprint font (RULE-015). Consider alternatives for future projects.

works.lesson: Variable optical serif + geometric sans creates organic tension on dark minimal canvas. Fraunces wonk axis adds handmade quality.
works.caution: Outfit is an emerging AI fingerprint font (RULE-015). Consider alternatives for future projects.

works.lesson: Playfair Display high stroke contrast creates strong editorial authority at 64px+. Pairs well with Source Sans 3 humanist sans.

works.reaction: Sharp Didone + geometric humanist = quiet blade aesthetic
works.lesson: DM Serif Display works well for minimal dark -- different from Fraunces (wonky) or Syne (wide). Clean editorial without being generic.
works.repetitionWarning: Identical display+body pairing to gentile-natalia. Different contexts (real estate vs practice) but no differentiation.

watchList.reason: Increasingly common in AI-generated sites. Used in Forge Studio body but flagged by RULE-015.
Popular in AI outputs. Used in Coque + peritas-tech body.
Emerging AI fingerprint. Used in practice-17 body.
Common in AI outputs. Used in gentile-natalia + practice-v2 body.
Emerging AI fingerprint. Not yet used in projects.
